reasoning: Experience: 12+ years in software development (exceeds 6+ years requirement), with 6+ years in senior/full-stack roles (Optilyz, re:cinq, GISCollective, etc.).
Stack match: Strong in TypeScript/Node.js/React (primary stack), with additional experience in Java/Kotlin (Dunnhumby, Altom, GISCollective). MongoDB/SQL covered (Optilyz, GISCollective).
AI/ML exposure: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq (matches secondary requirement for AI agent development).
Cloud/DevOps: AWS CDK (Optilyz), Docker/Kubernetes (GISCollective, Altom), CI/CD (RIDE Capital) — aligns with cloud/containerization requirements.
Testing: Vitest not explicitly mentioned, but Jest expertise is present (Altom, workshops). Playwright not mentioned, but testing focus is evident.
Architecture: Experience in scalable systems (Dunnhumby: 1M+ HTTP requests/sec), micro-services, and event-driven platforms (GISCollective).
Soft skills: Collaborative work (pair programming, TDD at RIDE Capital), user-focused delivery (GISCollective, Green Map), and mentorship (workshops).
Gaps: No explicit mention of Nest.js (primary stack) or GCP/Azure (cloud platforms). Security/authentication not highlighted in resume.
Education: BS in Computer Science (matches core qualification).
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack development with deep expertise in TypeScript/Node.js/React stack
Proven experience with scalable systems, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes)
Direct hands-on experience with AI-agent development and MCP (Model Context Protocol) at re:cinq
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
Limited detail on security/authentication best practices in resume
Testing stack mentions Jest but not Vitest/Playwright (primary/secondary testing frameworks)
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the experience requirement with 12+ years in full-stack roles, including direct experience with the primary stack (TypeScript/Node.js/React) and relevant secondary technologies (Java/Kotlin). His work on AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq aligns with emerging needs, and his cloud/DevOps expertise (AWS, Docker/K8s) is strong. Gaps like Nest.js and Vitest are minor given his overall profile, and his architecture/scalability experience is well-demonstrated.
